title: verbascum insulare
intro: Verbascum insulare, also known as the Jersey Cottontail or Jersey Mullein, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family native to the Channel Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high levels of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Verbascum insulare include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried leaves can be used in smoldering blends for its soothing and calming effects.
